name: Dictionary
summary: This is the interface to a LayOut dictionary. A Dictionary wraps key/value pairs.

constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::Dictionary.
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::Dictionary.

throws.when: if dict isn't a dictionary or hash

methods.name: delete_key
methods.summary: The #delete_key method deletes a key/value pair from the dictionary.
methods.remarks: The #delete_key method deletes a key/value pair from the dictionary.

returns.type: String, Boolean, Integer, Float, Layout::Dictionary, nil

methods.name: each
methods.summary: The #each_pair method is an alias for #each.
methods.remarks: The #each_pair method is an alias for #each.

methods.name: each_key
methods.summary: The #each_key method iterates through all of the dictionary keys.
methods.remarks: The #each_key method iterates through all of the dictionary keys.

methods.name: each_pair
methods.summary: The #each_pair method is an alias for #each.
methods.remarks: The #each_pair method is an alias for #each.

methods.name: empty?
methods.summary: The #empty? method checks if the dictionary is empty.
methods.remarks: The #empty? method checks if the dictionary is empty.

methods.name: keys
methods.summary: The #keys method retrieves an array with all of the dictionary keys.
methods.remarks: The #keys method retrieves an array with all of the dictionary keys.

returns.doc: an array of keys within the dictionary if successful

methods.name: length
methods.summary: The #length method retrieves the size (number of elements) of a dictionary.
methods.remarks: The #length method retrieves the size (number of elements) of a dictionary.

methods.name: size
methods.summary: The #length method retrieves the size (number of elements) of a dictionary.
methods.remarks: The #length method retrieves the size (number of elements) of a dictionary.

methods.name: values
methods.summary: The #values method retrieves an array with all of the dictionary values.
methods.remarks: The #values method retrieves an array with all of the dictionary values.

returns.doc: an array of values within the dictionary if successful

properties.type: String, Boolean, Integer, Float, Layout::Dictionary, nil
properties.summary: The #[] method retrieves the value for a given key.
properties.remarks: The #[] method retrieves the value for a given key.
